messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] R Examples for Actuaries
messages.body_plain:
Hello everyone,

Not exactly a request for help, but two recent blog entries at Revolutions:

R Examples for Actuaries:
http://blog.revolution-computing.com/2009/08/r-examples-for-actuaries.html

R for Actuaries:
http://blog.revolution-computing.com/2009/07/r-for-actuaries.html

Hope this will help this group get going!


Regards,
Diego

messages.subject: [R-sig-ins] R Examples for Actuaries
messages.body_plain:
Thanks for the links!

In a similar topic, there is also the book 'Modern Actuarial Risk  
Theory using R' by Jan Dhaene, Michel Denuit, Rob Kaas and Marc  
Goovaerts.

Christophe
